proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_BRAF by feature_009 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_009 == 1 lines had mean dependency_BRAF -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in feature_009 == 0 lines; difference -0.5552 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_EGFR by feature_022 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_022 == 1 lines had mean dependency_EGFR -0.601 versus -0.2524 in feature_022 == 0 lines; difference -0.3486 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_ERBB2 by feature_024 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_024 == 1 lines had mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in feature_024 == 0 lines; difference -0.4321 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KRAS by feature_014 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_014 == 1 lines had mean dependency_KRAS -0.5594 versus -0.252 in feature_014 == 0 lines; difference -0.3075 (p <1e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == skin` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than non-skin cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == brain` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than non-brain cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == breast` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than non-breast cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_BRAF by feature_011 == 'skin'.
analyses.result_summary: Skin lines had mean dependency_BRAF -0.4721 versus -0.2938 in other lines; difference -0.1783 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_EGFR by feature_011 == 'brain'.
analyses.result_summary: Brain lines had mean dependency_EGFR -0.3307 versus -0.2755 in other lines; difference -0.0552 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_ERBB2 by feature_011 == 'breast'.
analyses.result_summary: Breast lines had mean dependency_ERBB2 -0.3208 versus -0.2916 in other lines; difference -0.0292 (p 6.37e-9).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KRAS by feature_011 == 'pancreatic'.
analyses.result_summary: Pancreatic lines had mean dependency_KRAS -0.426 versus -0.3133 in other lines; difference -0.1127 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KRAS by feature_011 == 'colorectal'.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean dependency_KRAS -0.3689 versus -0.319 in other lines; difference -0.05 (p <1e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines in the highest quartile of `feature_016` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RIT1 by feature_027 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_027 == 1 lines had mean dependency_RIT1 -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in feature_027 == 0 lines; difference -0.0955 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A by feature_011 == 'colorectal'.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean dependency_KIF18A -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in other lines; difference -0.468 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_TMED10 for feature_016 >= Q3.
analyses.result_summary: High-feature_016 lines had mean dependency_TMED10 -0.2816 versus -0.2447 in other lines; difference -0.0369 (p <1e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the highest quartile of `feature_016` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines in the highest quartile of `feature_016` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_DHX9 for feature_016 >= Q3.
analyses.result_summary: High-feature_016 lines had mean dependency_DHX9 -0.3614 versus -0.3243 in other lines; difference -0.0371 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_POLR2A for feature_016 >= Q3.
analyses.result_summary: High-feature_016 lines had mean dependency_POLR2A -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in other lines; difference -0.1043 (p <1e-12).

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RPL11 by feature_018 == 1.
analyses.result_summary: feature_018 == 1 lines had mean dependency_RPL11 -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in feature_018 == 0 lines; difference -0.1091 (p <1e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with both `feature_011 == colorectal` and `feature_035 == 1` have especially more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than expected from either predicate alone.
Cell lines with both `feature_027 == 1` and `feature_019` in the lowest quartile have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than other cell lines and show an enabling interaction.

Cell lines with both `feature_016` in the highest quartile and `feature_023` in the highest quartile have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines and show an enabling interaction.
Cell lines with both `feature_018 == 1` and `feature_016` in the highest quartile have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines and show an enabling interaction.

analyses.code: 2x2 interaction screen for feature_011 == 'colorectal' and feature_035 == 1 on dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: The colorectal plus feature_035 == 1 subgroup had a dependency_KIF18A subgroup-vs-rest effect of -0.6899 and a difference-in-differences interaction of -0.6822 (n=3925, p <1e-12).

analyses.code: 2x2 interaction screen for feature_027 == 1 and feature_019 <= Q1 on dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: The feature_027 == 1 plus low-feature_019 subgroup had a dependency_RIT1 subgroup-vs-rest effect of -0.1008 and a difference-in-differences interaction of -0.0103 (n=1162, p <1e-12).

analyses.code: 2x2 interaction screen for feature_016 >= Q3 and feature_023 >= Q3 on dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: The high-feature_016 plus high-feature_023 subgroup had a dependency_DHX9 subgroup-vs-rest effect of -0.0595 and a difference-in-differences interaction of -0.0133 (n=3320, p <1e-12).

analyses.code: 2x2 interaction screen for feature_018 == 1 and feature_016 >= Q3 on dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: The feature_018 == 1 plus high-feature_016 subgroup had a dependency_RPL11 subgroup-vs-rest effect of -0.1303 and a difference-in-differences interaction of -0.014 (n=2557, p <1e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For dependency_BRAF, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_009 == 1 AND feature_030 == 0 have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_EGFR, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_022 == 1 AND feature_016 in highest quartile have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_ERBB2, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_024 == 1 AND feature_022 == 0 have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_KRAS, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_014 == 1 AND feature_009 == 0 have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_RIT1, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_027 == 1 AND feature_019 in lowest quartile have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_KIF18A, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_011 == colorectal AND feature_035 == 1 have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_TMED10, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_016 in highest quartile AND feature_024 == 0 have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_DHX9, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_016 in highest quartile AND feature_023 in highest quartile have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_POLR2A, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_016 in highest quartile AND feature_027 == 0 have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than all other cell lines.
For dependency_RPL11, cell lines satisfying both predicates feature_018 == 1 AND feature_016 in highest quartile have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_BRAF, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_009 == 1 AND feature_030 == 0: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.5514, difference-in-differences -0.0047, n=5200, p <1e-12. The strongest single-predicate negative hit was feature_009 1 with effect -0.5552, p <1e-12.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_EGFR, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_022 == 1 AND feature_016 in highest quartile: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.3526, difference-in-differences 0.0009, n=964, p <1e-12. The strongest single-predicate negative hit was feature_022 1 with effect -0.3486, p <1e-12.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_ERBB2, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_024 == 1 AND feature_022 == 0: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.4286, difference-in-differences 0.0101, n=4533, p <1e-12. The strongest single-predicate negative hit was feature_024 1 with effect -0.4321, p <1e-12.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_KRAS, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_014 == 1 AND feature_009 == 0: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.2988, difference-in-differences -0.0073, n=10701, p <1e-12. The strongest single-predicate negative hit was feature_014 1 with effect -0.3075, p <1e-12.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_RIT1, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_027 == 1 AND feature_019 in lowest quartile: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.1008, difference-in-differences -0.0103, n=1162, p <1e-12. The strongest single-predicate negative hit was feature_027 1 with effect -0.0955, p <1e-12.

analyses.code: Automated screen of all feature main effects and pairwise subgroup interactions for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: For dependency_KIF18A, the strongest two-predicate subgroup search hit was feature_011 == colorectal AND feature_035 == 1: subgroup-vs-rest effect -0.6899, difference-in-differences -0.6822, n=3925, p <1e-12.
